  return <MDXLayout {...layoutProps} {...props} components={components} mdxType="MDXLayout">


    <p>{`Before you start to work with React components, you must set node environment variables in the `}<inlineCode parentName="p">{`.env`}</inlineCode>{` and `}<inlineCode parentName="p">{`.env.development`}</inlineCode>{` files.
The `}<inlineCode parentName="p">{`.env`}</inlineCode>{` file contains the environment variables for production. The `}<inlineCode parentName="p">{`.env.development`}</inlineCode>{` file supersedes the environment variables in `}<inlineCode parentName="p">{`.env`}</inlineCode>{` and sets specific environment variables for development.`}</p>
    <h2>{`Basic configuration`}</h2>
    <h3>{`GRAPHQL_SERVER_URL`}</h3>
    <p>{`Specifies the relative location for the GraphQL server. For example, the following value sets the full URL for the GrpahQL server to `}<inlineCode parentName="p">{`https://<server>:<port>/Rest/graphql`}</inlineCode>{`.
If this value if not set, a default value of `}<inlineCode parentName="p">{`/Rest/grpahql`}</inlineCode>{` is used.`}</p>
    <pre><code parentName="pre" {...{}}>{`GRAPHQL_SERVER_URL=/Rest/graphql
`}</code></pre>
    <p>{`Where `}<inlineCode parentName="p">{`server`}</inlineCode>{` is the domain name or IP address of the server and `}<inlineCode parentName="p">{`port`}</inlineCode>{` is the port number for the application server.`}</p>
    <h3>{`CLIENT_DIR`}</h3>
    <p>{`Specifies the location of the `}<inlineCode parentName="p">{`webclient`}</inlineCode>{` directory in the development installation. This value is used to test the integration of components with custom UIM or VIM pages in Social Program Management.`}</p>
    <pre><code parentName="pre" {...{}}>{`CLIENT_DIR=<CLIENT_DIR> 
`}</code></pre>
    <p>{`Where `}<inlineCode parentName="p">{`CLIENT_DIR`}</inlineCode>{` is the location of the `}<inlineCode parentName="p">{`webclient`}</inlineCode>{` directory in the Java development environment.`}</p>
    <h3>{`RELATIVE_PATH_TO_BUNDLE`}</h3>
    <p>{`(Mandatory) Specifies the location of the compiled JavaScript relative to the server.`}</p>
    <pre><code parentName="pre" {...{}}>{`RELATIVE_PATH_TO_BUNDLE=CDEJ/jscript/SPMUIComponents/
`}</code></pre>
    <h3>{`CUSTOM_COMPONENT_NAME`}</h3>
    <p>{`Specifies the location of the web client component to copy the compiled JavaScript to during deployment. For example:`}</p>
    <pre><code parentName="pre" {...{}}>{`CUSTOM_COMPONENT_NAME=custom
`}</code></pre>
    <p>{`If omitted, the default value ‘custom’ is used.`}</p>
    <h2>{`Security Configuration`}</h2>
    <p>{`If you have enabled Cross-Site Request Forgery (CSRF) protection in Social Program Management, you must set the following environment variables for production (.env).
For more information about configuring CSRF in a React environment, see `}<a parentName="p" {...{
        "href": "https://www.ibm.com/docs/en/spm/8.0.1?topic=sauara-enabling-cross-site-request-forgery-csrf-protection-universal-access"
      }}>{`Enabling Cross-Site Request Forgery (CSRF) protection for Universal Access`}</a>{`.`}</p>
    <h3>{`CSRF_TOKEN_ENPOINT`}</h3>
    <p>{`Specifies the REST endpoint that generates a security token to be sent with each GraphQL HTTP request. Set the following value:`}</p>
    <pre><code parentName="pre" {...{}}>{`CSRF_TOKEN_ENPOINT=/Rest/v1/csrf/tokens
`}</code></pre>
    <h3>{`CSRF_TOKEN_REQUEST_HEADER`}</h3>
    <p>{`Specifies the custom HTTP request header to be sent with each GraphQL request. It is also used to get the security token from the response to the REST endpoint used to generate the token. Set the following value:`}</p>
    <pre><code parentName="pre" {...{}}>{`CSRF_TOKEN_REQUEST_HEADER=X-IBM-SPM-CSRF
`}</code></pre>

    </MDXLayout>;
}
